turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I wanted to ask about an EMI option for a big bill. We had a surgery last week and the amount is quite high.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand, and we do offer EMI options for bills above ₹10,000. May I ask for the patient name and bill amount?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Patient is my wife, Rekha Pillai. And the bill is around ₹78,000.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, that's definitely eligible for our EMI scheme. We have tie-ups with Bajaj Finserv and HDFC Bank for no-cost EMI up to 6 months. Your wife would need to be present with her Aadhaar and PAN card to apply.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can we do this at the billing counter tomorrow?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely, the billing counter handles EMI applications between 9 AM and 6 PM on weekdays. Just ask for the finance desk when you arrive.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect. And the amount due — is part of it already covered by insurance?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can see the insurance has settled ₹52,000 already. The outstanding balance to be paid or EMI'd is ₹26,000.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's manageable. Thank you so much.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course, Mr. Pillai. Wishing Mrs. Pillai a speedy recovery!
